entities.description: teenage boy with slim build, short dark hair, wearing a blue hooded raincoat and dark pants
small gray cat with short fur, bright eyes, pointed ears, and a slightly fluffy tail
tall old-fashioned streetlamp with a curved metal post and glowing round lamp
narrow wet city alley with brick walls, puddles, and reflective pavement

panels.summary: Wide establishing shot of a rain-soaked city alley at night, puddles rippling under the glow of a lone streetlamp, the boy walking in from the distance with hood up.
Medium shot of the boy trudging through the alley, rain streaming from his blue hooded raincoat, shoulders slightly hunched against the cold.
Low-angle close shot of a gray cat sitting beside a puddle beneath the streetlamp, its reflection shimmering in the rainwater as it watches the boy.
The boy stops mid-step and looks down in surprise; the gray cat sits calmly in front of him, rain falling between them.
Close-up of the boy's wide eyes under the rain hood, with sharp manga speed lines emphasizing his shock.
Close-up of the gray cat lifting one paw with a dignified expression, tail curled neatly around its feet under the streetlamp glow.
Two-shot in the wet alley: the boy crouches to the cat's level, curious now, while rain splashes around them and reflections stretch across the pavement.
The cat turns and begins walking deeper into the alley, glancing back over its shoulder; the boy hesitates, framed by rain and shadow.
Final wide shot: the boy follows the gray cat into the rain-dark alley, both becoming small silhouettes beneath the streetlamp's fading light.
